description_long: This is a compact, utilitarian trailer with a boxy, green-painted metal body mounted on a sturdy frame and two large wheels. The trailer features a prominent cylindrical exhaust or vent pipe on top, and a mechanical component at the rear, possibly a generator or pump. On one side, there are several control panels, dials, and what appear to be tool holders, suggesting it is designed for technical or maintenance purposes. The front of the trailer has a triangular warning sign with an exclamation mark, and a robust towing arm with a circular hitch for attachment to a vehicle. The surface is rugged and matte, with visible wear and utilitarian detailing, indicating it is built for outdoor or industrial use. No windows or branding are visible, and the trailer appears to be fully enclosed with no accessible doors.
description: A rugged, green metal utility trailer with a boxy body, large wheels, a top-mounted exhaust pipe, and a front warning sign. It features control panels and tool holders on one side, with a robust towing arm and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green boxy body, large wheel, control panels, and towing arm extending forward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the triangular warning sign, the top exhaust pipe, and the width of the trailer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible tool holders, control panels, and the towing arm; similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the mechanical component, the back of the boxy body, and the structure of the towing arm.
attribute_branding_or_signage: triangular warning sign with exclamation mark on front
